verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Father, we love You We worship and adore you Glorify your name in all the earth

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Glorify your name Glorify your name Glorify your name in all the earth

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus, we love You We worship and adore You Glorify your name in all the earth

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Spirit, we love You We worship and adore You Glorify your name in all the earth
